name: surfing-marketplace
description: Automated surf spot research for surfers: aggregates Surfline, Wannasurf, surf-forecast.com spot guides, Open-Meteo marine forecasts, NOAA buoy observations and tide predictions into comprehensive surf spot reports with session windows, hazards, and wetsuit recommendations
